{#- Blog comments (giscus). Post pages only, unless the post carries a bare ":no_comments:" field. Config comes from conf.py via _ext/giscus.py. Hidden until js/giscus.js has the widget up, so a reader with JS off gets nothing rather than an empty box. data-term is the source path, not the URL, so a domain change keeps threads attached. -#} {% if is_blog_post and giscus_repo %}

{{ _('Comments') }}

{%- if giscus_policy_url %}

{% trans %}Please read the{% endtrans %} {{ _('commenting guidelines') }} {% trans %}before posting.{% endtrans %}

{%- endif %}
{% endif %}
